title: oncidium parviflorum
intro: Oncidium parviflorum, also known as the small-flowered oncidium, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Oncidium parviflorum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are made by steeping the roots and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
